_note: E3 ground truth (PRD §6): 40 valid NL scenarios with hand-labeled configs + 27 deliberately invalid scenarios that must be rejected (10 original + 6 track-offset range-phrased cases added after a real bug: 'Shift Rolly 50 to 200 km south' was silently accepted at the range's high end instead of refused + 11 further range-phrased cases covering intensity, bearing, and compound multi-field ranges, all verified for repeat-stability at temperature=0 before being added). PRD §6 says ground truth is labeled by the author and is not delegable; this set was authored by the coding agent at the author's explicit direction — that circularity caveat is disclosed in the README rather than hidden.

valid.text: Replay Typhoon Haiyan exactly as it happened in 2013.
Run the historical Rolly scenario with no changes.
Show me Odette's actual 2021 impact, no counterfactual.
What if Haiyan had tracked 100 km further north?
Shift Rolly's track 50 km south.
Move Odette 200 km west.
Haiyan making landfall 75 km east of its actual track.
Suppose Rolly's path was displaced 150 km to the northeast.
Odette shifted 120 km southwest.
Push Haiyan's track 60 km northwest.
Rolly, moved 90 km to the southeast.
Offset Odette's track by 100 km at bearing 30 degrees.
Translate Haiyan 250 km at a compass bearing of 200 degrees.
What if Haiyan had been 20 knots stronger?
Rolly with winds reduced by 30 knots.
Odette intensified by 45 kn.
A weaker Haiyan: subtract 15 knots from its max winds.
Increase Rolly's maximum sustained winds by 10 knots.
Odette at 25 knots below its historical intensity.
Boost Haiyan's intensity by 60 knots.
Rolly weakened by 60 kn.
Haiyan 100 km north and 20 knots stronger.
Shift Odette 80 km east and weaken it by 10 knots.
Rolly displaced 200 km at bearing 90 with +35 kn intensity.
A Haiyan that tracks 40 km south and loses 25 knots of wind.
Odette moved 300 km north with winds up 15 knots.
Rolly 25 km west, 5 knots stronger.
Replay Typhoon Yolanda's historical track.
What if Goni had made landfall 100 km further south?
Typhoon Rai shifted 150 km northeast.
Imagine Haiyan's eye passing 130 km north of where it actually did.
Counterfactual: Odette makes landfall with an extra 40 knots of wind.
Same track as Rolly, but 50 knots weaker at every point.
Haiyan translated 250 km due west.
Nudge Odette 10 km east.
Rolly's track offset 175 km at bearing 315 degrees.
Haiyan with max winds up by 55 knots and the track unchanged.
Move Odette's entire track 220 km at bearing 270 and drop intensity 20 kn.
What if Rolly had come ashore 60 km north of its real landfall with 30 additional knots of wind?
Shift Haiyan 90 km at bearing 135 and strengthen it by 25 knots.

invalid.text: Shift Haiyan 800 km north.
invalid.why_invalid: track offset above the 500 km hard limit

invalid.text: Rolly with 100 extra knots of wind.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta above the +60 kn hard limit

invalid.text: Odette weakened by 75 knots.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta below the -60 kn hard limit

invalid.text: What if Typhoon Mangkhut had hit Manila?
invalid.why_invalid: Mangkhut/Ompong (2018) is not one of the three registered storms

invalid.text: Simulate Haiyan's storm surge with a 3 meter higher sea level.
invalid.why_invalid: storm surge / sea level is out of scope — wind hazard only

invalid.text: How much rainfall flooding would Rolly cause if it stalled over Bicol for two days?
invalid.why_invalid: rainfall/flood and stalling are not expressible in the wind-only schema

invalid.text: Move Odette 1000 km west so it misses the Philippines entirely.
invalid.why_invalid: track offset above the 500 km hard limit

invalid.text: Give me casualty estimates for a stronger Haiyan.
invalid.why_invalid: casualty estimation is a hard non-goal, and 'stronger' is unquantified

invalid.text: Shift the track of some big typhoon 100 km north.
invalid.why_invalid: no registered storm identified

invalid.text: Rolly offset 100 km at bearing 400 degrees.
invalid.why_invalid: bearing outside [0, 360) — must be rejected, not silently normalized to 40

invalid.text: Shift Rolly 50 to 200 km south.
invalid.why_invalid: track offset given as a range — every numeric field must be a single value; a real bug caught here where the compiler silently picked the range's high end (200) instead of refusing

invalid.text: Move Odette between 100 and 150 km west.
invalid.why_invalid: track offset given as a range, 'between X and Y' phrasing

invalid.text: Increase Rolly's intensity by 10 to 20 knots.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as a range

invalid.text: Weaken Haiyan by roughly 20 knots, give or take 10.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as an implicit range ('give or take'), not a single quantified value

invalid.text: Shift Haiyan 50-100 km north.
invalid.why_invalid: track offset given as a hyphenated range

invalid.text: Offset Odette's track somewhere in the 80 to 120 km range at bearing 90.
invalid.why_invalid: track offset explicitly stated as a range

invalid.text: Increase Haiyan's intensity somewhere between 15 and 45 knots.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as a range, 'between X and Y' phrasing

invalid.text: Weaken Odette by 20-40 knots.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as a hyphenated range

invalid.text: Boost Rolly's winds by at least 20 knots, maybe up to 50.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as an 'at least X, maybe up to Y' range

invalid.text: Change Haiyan's intensity by plus or minus 15 knots.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as a plus-or-minus range, ambiguous in direction and magnitude

invalid.text: Rolly could be anywhere from 10 knots weaker to 10 knots stronger.
invalid.why_invalid: intensity delta given as a range spanning both weakening and strengthening

invalid.text: Shift Odette's track somewhere between bearing 30 and 60 degrees, 90 km.
invalid.why_invalid: track bearing given as a range, offset is a single value

invalid.text: Move Haiyan north-ish, between 0 and 45 degrees bearing, by 100 km.
invalid.why_invalid: track bearing given as a range ('north-ish' plus explicit degree range)

invalid.text: Rolly's track bearing could be anywhere from 200 to 250 degrees, offset 80 km.
invalid.why_invalid: track bearing given as a range

invalid.text: Push Odette in a general northeasterly direction, bearing 20-70 degrees, 90 km.
invalid.why_invalid: track bearing given as a hyphenated range

invalid.text: Shift Haiyan's bearing by roughly 180 degrees, give or take 20, offset 100 km.
invalid.why_invalid: track bearing given as an implicit 'give or take' range

invalid.text: Shift Rolly 50 to 100 km south and weaken it by 10 to 30 knots.
invalid.why_invalid: compound case: both track offset and intensity delta given as ranges in the same request
